more.title: Bellarmine Mugabe Deported from South Africa After Firearm Incident
more.description: Bellarmine Mugabe has been deported from South Africa after paying a fine for pointing an object resembling a firearm and violating immigration laws.

more.title: Caledonia Mining Weighs $100 Million Convertibles Against Q1 Production Strain
more.description:
Caledonia Mining (NYSEAM:CMCL) plans to issue $100 million of convertible senior notes to support the Bilboes gold project and general corporate purposes.
The company reported Q1 production that was below the same period last year, citing operational constraints.
Despite the softer Q1, management reaffirmed full year production guidance for 2026.

Caledonia Mining is a gold producer with operations focused on Zimbabwe, where the Bilboes gold project is a key growth asset. The proposed $100...
